title: Cooperation Method of Connected and Automated Vehicles at Unsignalized Intersections: Lane Changing and Arrival Scheduling
authors: Chaoyi Chen; Mengchi Cai; Jiawei Wang; Kai Li; Qing Xu; Jianqiang Wang; Keqiang Li
method_family: Lane assignment + arrival scheduling / 车道分配与到达调度

section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Lane changing + arrival scheduling：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. T WO-STAGE COOPERATION FRAMEWORK
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 框架先求多车目标分配与路径规划，再基于最终路径构建冲突图并求到达时间。这样横向变道改变冲突关系，纵向调度再处理被改变后的路口资源竞争。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. M ULTI-VEHICLE TARGET ASSIGNMENT AND PATH
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. SIMULATIONS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 验证方法是否在公平基准下改善效率、安全、能耗或计算时间。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Check whether the claimed improvements are supported by fair baselines and meaningful metrics.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 实验应与论文声称的贡献闭环：Numerical simulations for different vehicle counts and traffic volumes.
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 重点追踪指标：平均延误、总行程时间、完成变道比例、冲突避免成功率和交通量敏感性。 同时检查仿真平台、交通需求和随机性设置。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 实验是否只展示平均收益，还是覆盖了高密度、异常扰动和失败案例？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：当车辆可以变道或选择目标车道时，如何联合决定路径/车道与无冲突到达时间？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：车辆可执行规划出的变道动作，周围交通允许形成编队。；车道级地图和目标车道需求已知。；变道安全约束可以被简化成可规划的路径/队形约束。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“联合车道分配与到达时间优化 / Joint lane assignment and arrival scheduling”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Two-stage framework decoupling lateral lane assignment/path planning from graph-based arrival scheduling with minimum clique cover.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Numerical simulations for different vehicle counts and traffic volumes.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Useful for discussing route-template/lane-choice extensions beyond the current fixed-route JSSP formulation.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
联合车道分配与到达时间优化 / Joint lane assignment and arrival scheduling
Two-stage framework decoupling lateral lane assignment/path planning from graph-based arrival scheduling with minimum clique cover.
Conflict-free arrival scheduling and formation-control assumptions prevent incompatible movements.
Improves traffic efficiency by choosing target lanes and arrival schedules that avoid unnecessary queuing.
Numerical simulations for different vehicle counts and traffic volumes.

contribution_matrix.comment: 联合车道分配与到达时间优化 / Joint lane assignment and arrival scheduling
Two-stage framework decoupling lateral lane assignment/path planning from graph-based arrival scheduling with minimum clique cover.
Numerical simulations for different vehicle counts and traffic volumes.

contribution_matrix.dimension: 博士课题价值 / PhD relevance
contribution_matrix.comment: Useful for discussing route-template/lane-choice extensions beyond the current fixed-route JSSP formulation.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：联合车道分配与到达时间优化 / Joint lane assignment and arrival scheduling，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Lane changing + arrival scheduling”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Lane changing + arrival scheduling. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: arXiv note reports text overlap with the authors' earlier graph-based paper; use mainly for lane-changing extension context.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 当车辆可以变道或选择目标车道时，如何联合决定路径/车道与无冲突到达时间？
overview.core_question_en: How should target-lane assignment and conflict-free arrival scheduling be coupled when vehicles may change lanes before the intersection?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Two-stage framework decoupling lateral lane assignment/path planning from graph-based arrival scheduling with minimum clique cover.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Conflict-free arrival scheduling and formation-control assumptions prevent incompatible movements.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Improves traffic efficiency by choosing target lanes and arrival schedules that avoid unnecessary queuing.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：中等：在 P02 图排序基础上加入横向决策，扩展性有价值，但理论新颖性主要来自组合而非新算法。

methodology.model_name: 联合车道分配与到达时间优化 / Joint lane assignment and arrival scheduling
symbols: 由车道选择诱导的冲突边集
说明横向选择会改变调度约束
保证冲突车辆时间分离
methodology.algorithm_zh: 框架先求多车目标分配与路径规划，再基于最终路径构建冲突图并求到达时间。这样横向变道改变冲突关系，纵向调度再处理被改变后的路口资源竞争。
methodology.algorithm_en: The framework first assigns target lanes/paths, then constructs a conflict graph for those paths and computes a conflict-free arrival schedule.
methodology.stability_zh: 分阶段设计提高实时性，但牺牲联合最优性；如果第一阶段车道选择失误，第二阶段只能在较差冲突结构上补救。
methodology.stability_en: The two-stage decomposition is tractable but not globally optimal; poor lane assignment can constrain the downstream scheduler.
assumptions: 车辆可执行规划出的变道动作，周围交通允许形成编队。
车道级地图和目标车道需求已知。
变道安全约束可以被简化成可规划的路径/队形约束。

experiments.validation: Numerical simulations for different vehicle counts and traffic volumes.
experiments.baselines: 固定车道策略、无变道调度、FCFS 和基于图的到达调度。
experiments.metrics: 平均延误、总行程时间、完成变道比例、冲突避免成功率和交通量敏感性。
experiments.ablation: 最关键消融是去掉 lane-changing stage，对比是否真的改善调度；还应测试高密度下变道失败的退化策略。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。

figure_table_cues.zh: 冲突关系图 / 通行顺序图
figure_table_cues.reading: 把节点、边类型和先后约束翻译成 JSSP 的作业、机器和析取约束。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 文本与同作者早期图调度工作高度相关，独立贡献需谨慎引用。
横向控制细节和人类驾驶干扰不足。
两阶段解耦可能错过更优的路径-时间联合解。
extensions: 用双层优化 (bi-level optimization) 同时学习车道选择和 JSSP 排序。
为变道失败设计可恢复调度 (recoverable scheduling)，让路口管理器在线回滚目标车道。
把车道选择看成 route-template selection，扩展当前固定路线假设。
critique.project_use: Useful for discussing route-template/lane-choice extensions beyond the current fixed-route JSSP formulation.

interactive.response_zh: 比例增加会提高调度自由度，但过高时变道冲突和局部扰动也会增加。
interactive.response_en: More lane-change freedom improves scheduling flexibility but can add lateral conflicts.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
